settings.content:
This graphic t-shirt is perfect for any occasion. Crafted from a soft and breathable 100% combed cotton, it offers superior comfort and everyday style. Regular fit, ribbed crew neck, and a durable screen-printed graphic that won't crack or fade after washing.

Fabric: 100% combed cotton, 220gsm
Fit: Regular / true to size
Care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

settings.review_text: I absolutely love this t-shirt! The design is unique and the fabric feels so comfortable. As a fellow designer, I appreciate the attention to detail. It's become my favorite go-to shirt.

The t-shirt exceeded my expectations! The colors are vibrant and the print quality is top-notch. Being a UI/UX designer myself, I'm quite picky about aesthetics, and this shirt definitely gets a thumbs up.

This t-shirt is a must-have for anyone who appreciates good design. The minimalistic yet stylish pattern caught my eye, and the fit is perfect. I can see the attention to detail in every aspect of this shirt.

As a design enthusiast, I value simplicity and functionality. This t-shirt not only represents those principles but also feels great to wear. It's evident that real creativity went into making it stand out.

This t-shirt is a fusion of comfort and creativity. The fabric is soft, and the design speaks volumes about skill. It's like wearing a piece of art that reflects a passion for both design and fashion.
I'm not just wearing a t-shirt; I'm wearing a piece of design philosophy. The intricate details and thoughtful layout of the design make this shirt a real conversation starter.

settings.question: What size should I order?
settings.answer: This t-shirt fits true to size with a relaxed, regular cut. If you prefer an oversized look, we recommend sizing up.

settings.question: What material is this shirt made from?
settings.answer: It's made from 100% combed cotton at 220gsm for a soft hand-feel and long-lasting shape.

settings.question: How do I wash this shirt without cracking the print?
settings.answer: Wash cold, inside out, and tumble dry on low or hang dry. Avoid ironing directly over the printed graphic.

settings.question: Do the colors shown match the actual product?
settings.answer: We calibrate our product photography to be as accurate as possible, but slight variations can occur depending on your screen settings.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Unworn items with tags attached can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard shipping takes 3 to 7 business days depending on your location. Express options are available at checkout.
